productDisplayName: Little Miss Girls Blazing White Top
description: Style NoteIf your little angel's mantra in life is to have fun and stay comfy, this top from Little Miss is perfect for her! Specially made for all the adorable little princesses, this tee is all she needs to tell the world that she is the new miss sunshine! Team it with comfy footwearProduct DetailsWhite sleeveless top with a a double frill around the neckline, a pink bow on the left shoulder, graphic print on the front and a frill at the hemMaterial and Care100% CottonHand wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededLine dryCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
